name: Barber Shop
title: AI Tools for Barber Shops | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for barber shops — fill the chair, cut no-shows, and bring clients back on schedule. Unlimited AI agents for one flat $3,500/month.
hero_lede: An empty chair is lost money you can't get back. No-shows and forgotten rebookings quietly drain the week. We build the tools that keep the chairs full and the regulars coming back.
drains: Booking requests and texts coming in while you're cutting
No-shows leaving gaps in the day's schedule
Regulars who fall off their rebooking rhythm
Empty mid-week and mid-day slots that never get filled

tools.title: Booking assistant
tools.body: Every call, text, and message gets an instant reply and a booked slot, so you're not stopping a cut to answer the phone or losing a client to a slow reply.

tools.title: No-show reducer
tools.body: Well-timed confirmations and reminders go out before every appointment, and open gaps from cancellations get offered to waiting clients.

tools.title: Rebooking assistant
tools.body: It nudges regulars when they're due for their next cut, keeping the chair-filling rhythm steady instead of leaving it to memory.

tools.title: Daily chair brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's appointments, any open slots to fill, and yesterday's numbers.

cases.context: A barber shop losing time to no-shows.
cases.before: No-shows left gaps the shop couldn't fill on short notice.
cases.after: Reminders cut no-shows; open gaps offered to waiting clients automatically.
cases.impact: Representative result: fewer empty chairs and steadier daily revenue.

cases.context: A shop whose regulars drifted off schedule.
cases.before: Rebooking depended on the client remembering to come back.
cases.after: Regulars nudged automatically when they're due for the next cut.
cases.impact: Representative result: a more predictable, fuller weekly schedule.

faq.q: Can it book appointments while I'm cutting?
faq.a: Yes. The assistant answers calls, texts, and messages and books slots without you putting down the clippers.

faq.q: How much can it really reduce no-shows?
faq.a: Well-timed confirmations and reminders make a real dent, and when someone does cancel, the open slot gets offered to waiting clients right away.

faq.q: Will it work with my booking app?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of Booksy, Square Appointments, or whatever you already use.
